text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her debut on the horizon, Tamamo Cross
has motivation in spades.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And yet, her meal before the big race is a single,
tiny box lunch. Will that really be enough to
sustain her? Worry fills my mind as I send her off.
